name: DEBUG
description: Debug block - provides interactive debugging capabilities with GUI
xmlExample:
<BasicBlock id="b1" parent="0:2:0" interfaceFunctionName="DEBUG" blockType="d" dependsOnU="0" dependsOnT="0" simulationFunctionName="%debug_scicos" simulationFunctionType="DEBUG" style="DEBUG">
  <Array as="exprs" scilabClass="ScilabList">
    <ScilabString height="1" width="1">
      <data line="0" column="0" value=""/>
    </ScilabString>
    <ScilabString height="1" width="1">
      <data line="0" column="0" value="xcos_debug_gui(flag,block);"/>
    </ScilabString>
  </Array>
  <mxGeometry as="geometry" x="0.0" y="-10.0" width="160.0" height="40.0"/>
</BasicBlock>
anomalies: exprs is ScilabList with debug code callbacks
Block title in file is 'CBLOCK4' - likely from copy/paste
criticalRules: No input/output - used for inspection and debugging only
Opens GUI windows for interactive variable inspection
Use for development/debugging - remove for production
